Class DRReport

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.DRReport
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIReport, Serializable
public class DRReport extends Object implements DRIReport

DRReport class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
